title: coelogyne loricata
intro: Coelogyne loricata, also known as the Helmet Orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of India and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Coelogyne loricata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant's extracts are often used to create infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
